package rulefixtures

import (
	credentials "github.com/aws/aws-sdk-go/aws/credentials"
)

// scenario for aws_credential_hardcoded: `credentials.NewStaticCredentials("AKID...", "secret...", "")` with literal access keys
// fixture polarity: positive; family: library; severity: error.
func scenario403Positive() *credentials.Credentials {
	return credentials.NewStaticCredentials("AKIDEXAMPLE", "hardcoded-secret", "")
}
